name: ddl-utils
description: Implement topological sorting for table dependency ordering and utility functions
acceptanceCriteria: topologicalSort(models: Record<string, any>) returns string[] of model names in dependency order per req-ddl-topo-sort
Tables with no FK dependencies appear first in order
Self-referential FKs do not break ordering per req-ddl-self-refs
Detects circular dependencies (excluding self-refs) and throws error with cycle description
Uses visited Set<string> pattern from finding-ddl-type-resolution to prevent infinite loops
toSnakeCase(str: string) converts PascalCase/camelCase to snake_case for column naming
Reserved word handling integrated with dialect.escapeIdentifier() per req-ddl-reserved-words
